related_questions.question: How much broadband bandwidth do I need?
Do I need 25 Mbps or 50 Mbps?
related_questions.snippet: We recommend getting at least 15–25 Mbps for basic on-demand streaming. Your experience will improve if you can get 50–100 Mbps. At those speeds, streaming performance will be much more reliable.

related_questions.question: What are the 4 types of bandwidth?
related_questions.snippet: Bandwidth in networking measures network data capacity in bits per second. Main types include dedicated, shared, symmetric, asymmetric, and burstable bandwidth. Each serves different networking purposes effectively.

related_questions.question: Do I need 250 or 400 Mbps internet?
related_questions.snippet: For most homes, a good download speed is between 250 Mbps and 1 Gig, depending on the number of devices simultaneously in use. A 1 Gig connection allows a family of four to stream TV, movies and games on multiple devices while using video conferencing, like Zoom, all at the same time.
